project_type: Go monorepo with panel server (HTTP API) and node agent (system daemon)
build_system: go build, no Makefile; node binary: go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o /usr/local/bin/panel-node ./node/cmd/node
test_framework: Go testing package, tests in *_test.go files alongside source
verification_instructions: 1. Run go build ./... 2. Run go test ./... 3. Verify new code compiles without errors
setup_instructions: Go 1.22 installed; run go build ./... from project root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Docker daemon needed. MySQL not available for integration tests.
contribution_requirements: Module path is koris-next. Imports use koris-next/panel/internal/... and koris-next/node/internal/...
key_patterns: Template engine in panel/internal/templates/ (engine.go, defaults.go, validate.go). Node agent task execution in node/cmd/node/main.go executeTask(). Config generation in node/cmd/node/outbound.go. Migrations in panel/migrations/ numbered sequentially. Installer at node-install.sh in repo root.
directory_structure: / - repo root with go.mod, node-install.sh. /panel/ - panel server (internal/api, internal/templates, migrations). /node/ - node agent (cmd/node, internal/config, internal/logger, internal/updater). /scripts/ - openvpn shell scripts, logrotate config.
